name: IDEXX LABORATORIES INC /DE
summary: PART I COMPANY OVERVIEW IDEXX was incorporated in Delaware in 1983. We develop, manufacture, and distribute products and provide services primarily for the companion animal veterinary; livestock, poultry and dairy; and water testing industries. We also manufacture and sell human medical point-of-care diagnostic products.
